Cousins Maine Lobster at Pier 41 delivers a flavorful seafood experience with its meaty lobster rolls, fast service, and welcoming waterfront setting. Reviews consistently highlight the lobster roll as the standout item, praised for its generous portions and fresh taste, while other dishes like lobster bisque and tater tots also earn positive mentions. The atmosphere is casual and friendly, with quick service and attentive staff creating a smooth dining experience. Some guests note that prices can feel high, but the quality of the lobster and the scenic location help justify the cost. Overall, it’s a dependable and enjoyable stop for seafood lovers visiting the pier.
Great roll and easy to access. When we went it wasn’t too crowded and it was a change from what everyone else was serving in the area. Very good!

We had a great experience here! The food was great, competitively priced compared to its neighbors, quick & friendly service. My husband and I had plenty of food between the lobster roll, tater tots, and the fish and chips!
